2604.15777.title: SegMix:Shuffle-based Feedback Learning for Semantic Segmentation of Pathology Images
2604.15777.paper_summary: Segmentation is a critical task in computational pathology, as it identifies areas affected by disease or abnormal growth and is essential for diagnosis and treatment. However, acquiring high-quality pixel-level supervised segmentation data requires significant workload demands from experienced pathologists, limiting the application of deep learning. To overcome this challenge, relaxing the label conditions to image-level classification labels allows for more data to be used and more scenarios to be enabled. One approach is to leverage Class Activation Map (CAM) to generate pseudo pixel-level annotations for semantic segmentation with only image-level labels. However, this method fails to thoroughly explore the essential characteristics of pathology images, thus identifying only small areas that are insufficient for pseudo masking. In this paper, we propose a novel shuffle-based feedback learning method inspired by curriculum learning to generate higher-quality pseudo-semantic segmentation masks. Specifically, we perform patch level shuffle of pathology images, with the model adaptively adjusting the shuffle strategy based on feedback from previous learning. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed approach outperforms state-of-the-arts on three different datasets.
2604.15777.paper_summary_zh: 分割在計算病理學中是一項關鍵任務，因為它識別受疾病或異常增生影響的區域，對於診斷和治療至關重要。<lb/>然而，獲取高質量的像素級監督分割數據需要經驗豐富的病理學家付出大量工作，這限制了深度學習的應用。<lb/>為了克服這一挑戰，放寬標籤條件至圖像級分類標籤可以使用更多數據並啟用更多場景。<lb/>一種方法是利用類別激活圖（Class Activation Map，CAM）僅使用圖像級標籤生成伪像素級註釋以進行語義分割。<lb/>然而，這種方法未能徹底探索病理圖像的基本特徵，因此僅識別出不足以進行伪遮罩的小區域。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了一種基於洗牌的反饋學習新方法，靈感來自課程學習，以生成更高質量的伪語義分割掩碼。<lb/>具體而言，我們對病理圖像進行區塊級的洗牌，模型根據先前學習的反饋自適應調整洗牌策略。<lb/>實驗結果表明，我們提出的方法在三個不同數據集上超越了當前的最先進技術。
2604.15777.author: Zhiling Yan et.al.
2604.15777.authors: Zhiling Yan, Sicheng Chen, Tianyi Zhang, Nan Ying, Yanli Lei, Guanglei Zhang
